name: codex-autoresearch
description: Codex skill bundle for subagent-first, repeatable improvement loops with pre-launch approval, persistent orchestration, specialization workflows, and background controls.

interface.shortDescription: Run subagent-first foreground or background improve-verify loops.
interface.longDescription: Codex Autoresearch supports iterative, measurable improvements with a standing subagent pool, pre-launch approval, continued execution by default after launch, scoped workflows, managed session hooks, memory carry-forward, and packaged plugin release validation.
defaultPrompt: Run a 10-step background hardening pass on this repository using codex-autoresearch.
Resume the last autoresearch run and reuse the stored memory baseline.
Use the ship workflow to stabilize this repo and validate the plugin release surface.
